name: gitlab
description: Search and manage GitLab issues, merge requests, and projects

tools.name: Get Issue
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific issue

tools.name: Create Issue
tools.description: Create a new issue in a project

tools.name: List Merge Requests
tools.description: List merge requests for a project or across projects

prompts.title: Find my issues
prompts.prompt: Search for issues assigned to me that are open. Show me the most important ones.

prompts.title: Review merge requests
prompts.prompt: Show me all open merge requests that need my review. Summarize what each one does.

prompts.title: Create bug report
prompts.prompt: Help me create a detailed bug report issue with steps to reproduce, expected vs actual behavior.

prompts.title: Project status
prompts.prompt: Give me a summary of my projects: open issues, merge requests, and recent activity.
